svg.title: KEYOB AI diagnostic map
svg.desc: An abstract business workflow showing AI analyzing process nodes, identifying inefficiencies, and routing improvements toward measurable outcomes.

circle.style: offset-path: path('M 20 140 L 130 140'); animation-delay:0s; animation-duration:3.2s;fill:rgb(24, 95, 165);stroke:none;color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, "system-ui", "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto
